title: 两者都是物理人工智能：Momenta 起飞，蘑菇 Chelians 怎么样？
description: “物理AI”重塑自动驾驶的资本叙事。
titleZh: 两者都是物理人工智能：Momenta 起飞，蘑菇 Chelians 怎么样？
titleEn: Both are physical AI: Momenta takes off, what about Mushroom Chelians?
descriptionZh: “物理AI”重塑自动驾驶的资本叙事。
descriptionEn: "Physical AI" reshapes the capital narrative of autonomous driving. Momenta successfully went public through this, while the early-mover Mushroom Chelians lagged behind due to the heavy-asset ToG model. Amid industry reshuffling, Haomo Zhixing fell short with empty concepts. This article compares the two paths and analyzes the industry truth behind concepts and real business models.

titleEn: Understanding Momenta reveals how profits in physical AI will flow
descriptionZh: 半年内推出600多款新车，行业利润率却骤降至3.2%。
descriptionEn: Over 600 new car models were launched in half a year, yet the industry’s profit margin has plummeted to a freezing 3.2%. While automakers are trapped in a chaotic low-price war of homogenization, the capital market is frantically bidding for a smart driving company that does not build cars. In the future era of physical AI, how will profits actually flow?
